query: I'm putting together my expense report. What are the most expensive restaurants I've booked?

selected_nodes.xml:
<Restaurant>
  <name>FRANK Restaurant at AGO</name>
  <time_block>2:00 PM - 3:00 PM</time_block>
  <description>Modern Canadian cuisine inside the Art Gallery. Artistic setting with creative seasonal menu.</description>
  <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
  <expected_cost>CAD 35-50</expected_cost>
  <highlights>
    <highlight>Museum dining</highlight>
    <highlight>Artistic atmosphere</highlight>
  </highlights>
</Restaurant>
<Restaurant>
  <name>Eataly Toronto</name>
  <time_block>12:30 PM - 1:30 PM</time_block>
  <description>Italian marketplace and restaurant in Manulife Centre. Indoor dining with fresh pasta, pizza, and espresso. Great for rainy day lunch.</description>
  <travel_method>Walk</travel_method>
  <expected_cost>CAD 35-50</expected_cost>
  <highlights>
    <highlight>Indoor restaurant</highlight>
    <highlight>Italian cuisine</highlight>
  </highlights>
</Restaurant>

raw_result.reasoning: Identified restaurants with the highest expected cost range.
